title: I will accept my part in God's plan for salvation.
text: Today we will attempt to go past the ego's narrow, self-defeating vision, to its plan for "salvation." You are asked to accept your part in God's plan for salvation. What is this plan? It is a very simple one, and its simplicity is what makes it so dependable. You are asked only to accept the Atonement for yourself.

archive.title: Salvation comes from my one Self.
I am one Self, united with my Creator.
I am as God created me.
Light and joy and peace abide in me.
